---
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
  page-size: 10
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
<div>
  <a href="https://www.buymeacoffee.com/bahmansadeghi">
    <img src="/bmc.png" alt="Buy Me a Coffe link" width="250" height="75">
  </a>
</div>
